title: Efficient Data Management System
description: A bakery management system built with Java, using binary search trees and hash maps for fast inventory lookups and order processing.
bullets: Binary search trees and hash maps for quick lookups and inventory management
Unique ISBN-style product IDs for every bakery item
Four access levels: Guest, Customer, Employee, Manager
Streamlined front-end to back-end data flow

title: This Website
description: Personal portfolio rebuilt from scratch with a modern stack.
bullets: Deployed on Vercel with automatic CI/CD on every push
